name: nexu-motion
description: Local, key-free audio editing, caption timing, and motion graphics workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Edit audio and render synchronized motion graphics locally.
interface.longDescription: Nexu Motion lets Codex clean and edit voiceovers, remove retakes and dead air, rebuild word-timed captions, create editable motion scenes, preview frames, and render MP4 videos locally. It needs no separate AI API key.
interface.defaultPrompt: Clean this audio, remove unwanted sections, rebuild the captions, and create a synchronized motion graphic.
